name: Inventory Control

declared_permissions.label: Inventory — open module and browse (dashboard, items, stock views)
Inventory — full control (item/location/batch master data, invoices, all APIs)
Inventory — record stock movements (in/out/transfer/return/repack) without editing item master

description: Production-grade inventory, costing, and stock control: item master (SKU, categories, lead time), locations and batches, FIFO/LIFO/AVG costing, reorder points, equipment assets with serial numbers (make, model, warranty, condition), sign-out to users or contractors (loaned vs permanent), usage-by-person and monthly usage charts, idempotent install/upgrade scripts, and supplier/invoice integration.

changes: Maintenance release — upload inventory_control_v0.0.4.zip before clients update.
Complete release package — upload full inventory_control_v0.0.3.zip to the repository before clients update.
Equipment assets: make, model, purchase_date, warranty_expiry, service_interval_days, condition (schema, API, PATCH, UI).
Per-person monthly usage API and stacked bar chart on item overview.
Bug sweep: weight/weight_uom in transactions CREATE, category_id in ensure_schema, usage APIs return empty on error, reserved word condition escaped.
install.py: upgrade() entry point, idempotent equipment upgrades, weight in transactions CREATE; CLI install|upgrade|uninstall.
Initial release of Inventory Control module.

Item master (SKU, name, categories, reorder point/quantity, lead time, equipment/requires-serial flags), locations, batches, stock levels, transactions (in/out/adjustment/transfer/count/return/repack).
Equipment assets table and serial tracking; sign-out to person (users + contractors), loaned vs permanent, due-back date.
Usage by person (consumables) and equipment assets table on item overview; people search API (core users + tb_contractors).
Idempotent install and runtime schema ensure for deployment safety.
